chunks.title: Zophar's Opening Argument on the Wicked's Fate
chunks.reason: Zophar introduces his response and describes the temporary nature of the wicked's success.

chunks.title: The Wicked Man's Wealth Turns to Poison
chunks.reason: Describes the reversal of the wicked man's fortune and the internal corruption of his wealth.

chunks.title: The Final Destruction of the Wicked
chunks.reason: Details the specific judgments and total loss awaiting the wicked man as his portion from God.
